# Third-Party Notices

Orbit vendors source code from `llama.cpp`, including `ggml`, under:

- `src/orbit/native_llama/vendor/source/llama.cpp/`

Upstream project:

- https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp

License:

- MIT

Orbit's vendored self-build path uses these upstream sources to build the native
runtime libraries needed by `orbit-server`. Model weights are not included here
and remain subject to their own licenses and distribution terms.
